hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import re, sys
try:
    v1 = re.search(r'version = \"([^\"]+)\"', open('pyproject.toml').read())
    v2 = re.search(r'__version__ = \"([^\"]+)\"', open('src/mkdocs_ask_ai/__init__.py').read())
    if v1 and v2 and v1.group(1) != v2.group(1):
        print(f'VERSION MISMATCH: pyproject.toml={v1.group(1)}, __init__.py={v2.group(1)} — update both files', file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(2)
except FileNotFoundError:
    pass
"
bash -c 'FILE="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then ruff check "$FILE" 2>&1 && ruff format --check "$FILE" 2>&1 || exit 2; fi'
